card.name: Room for Two
card.text: Enchant creature When Room for Two enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct creature token, then you gain 1 life for each creature you control. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Slimy Shellsnap
card.text: When Slimy Shellsnap enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Slimy Shellsnap. • Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Inconspicuous Amphin
card.text: When Inconspicuous Amphin enters, you may put target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard on top of your library. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Unmanned Carrier
card.text: Flying {3}{U}, Exile Unmanned Carrier from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: First Contact
card.text: Draw three cards. You may put a +1/+1 counter on a cryptid you control. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Paper Trail
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has "When this creature dies, create a Clue token." (It's a colorless artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Cover Identity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all colors, abilities, and creature types, and has base power and toughness 2/2.

card.name: Mindless Masses
card.text: Mindless Masses has all names of nonlegendary creature cards in addition to its name. A deck can have any number of cards named Mindless Masses.

card.name: Extravital Organs
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has menace and lifelink and "If this creature would die, you may instead return it to its owner's hand."

card.name: Evil Sky
card.text: You draw a card and you lose 1 life. Flashback {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Superior Skill
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. If that creature has a loyalty ability, put two loyalty counters on it.

card.name: Top Agent
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Top Agent gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Carnage Spawn
card.text: Haste When Carnage Spawn enters, cryptid creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Lashmass
card.text: When Lashmass enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Lashmass. • Lashmass fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Living Furnace
card.text: Reach {R}, Sacrifice an artifact: Living Furnace gets +1/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Tools of the Trade
Bioverdiversity
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. If there are five or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, those creatures also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Inner Beast
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Beast Horror in addition to its other types. As long as you control enchanted creature, it gets +2/+2. Otherwise, it can't block.

card.name: Sporeflayer
card.text: When Sporeflayer enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Sporeflayer. • You may play lands from your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Creatures from Worlds Beyond
card.text: Reach Whenever another cryptid enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Creatures from Worlds Beyond. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Chittering Tyrano
card.text: When Chittering Tyrano enters, choose one— • Put two +1/+1 counters on Chittering Tyrano. • Create two 1/1 black Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Might of the Many
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains trample and gets +X/+X, where X is the number of creature types among non-Human creatures you control.

card.name: Unquestioned Authority
card.text: Enchant creature When Unquestioned Authority enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature has protection from creatures.

card.name: Flight Researcher
card.text: Flying Sacrifice two artifacts: Return Flight Researcher from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Pinnacle of Divergence
card.text: Flying When Pinnacle of Divergence enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Pinnacle of Divergence. • Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Live and Let Die
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Flashback—{4}{B}, Sacrifice a creature or planeswalker. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Echoing Return
card.text: Return target creature card and all other cards with the same name as that card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Mech Tinkerer
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice an artifact, Discard a card: Draw a card. {T}, Sacrifice five artifacts: Create a 10/10 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Knobbleboar
card.text: When Knobbleboar enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Knobbleboar. • Knobbleboar gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Escape Containment
card.text: Create a 2/2 black Horror creature token, a 2/2 green Wolf creature token, and a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Invasion Frontrunner
card.text: Whenever Invasion Frontrunner enters from anywhere other than your hand, or you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, Invasion Frontrunner deals 2 damage to any target. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Optional Tentacles
Botanist Team
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Add {G}.

prop.type: Creature — Alien Badger Insect Kavu Troll

card.name: Contact Agents
card.text: Trample Contact Agents enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if it wasn't cast from your hand. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Intelligent Life
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each cryptid you control. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.) Reach When Intelligent Life enters, draw a card.

card.name: Biodiversity Survey
card.text: Draw X cards, where X is the number of creature types among non-Human creatures you control.

card.name: Epicenter of Evolution
card.text: If one or more counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one of each of those kinds of counters are put on that permanent instead. If you would get one or more counters, you get that many plus one of each of those kinds of counters instead.

card.name: Everflayer
card.text: Flying Whenever Everflayer or another cryptid enters under your control, choose one. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.) • Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. • Draw a card.

card.name: Universe Beholder
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Tap five untapped artifacts you control: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Then shuffle.

card.name: Anders, Truth Hunter
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts an instant or sorcery spell, exile that spell as it resolves and create a Clue token. When you sacrifice that Clue, you may cast the exiled card and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast that spell. (A Clue is a colorless artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Secrets Extractor
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level +1] Exile the top card of each player's library. [level -3] Until end of turn, you may play cards exiled with Secrets Extractor, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast those spells.

card.name: Breach Gateway
card.text: Creatures you control have haste. {2}{R}, {T}: Put a cryptid creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Extraplanar Fauna
card.text: Whenever you cast Extraplanar Fauna or another spell from exile, create a token that's a copy of Extraplanar Fauna. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Hyperadapt
card.text: Creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creature types among non-Human creatures you control.

card.name: Extraction Specialist
card.text: Lifelink When Extraction Specialist enters, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature can't attack or block for as long as you control Extraction Specialist.

card.name: Mission Briefing
card.text: Surveil 2, then choose an instant or sorcery card in your graveyard. You may cast it this turn. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Dogged Detective
card.text: When Dogged Detective enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Whenever an opponent draws their second card each turn, you may return Dogged Detective from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Conspiracy Theorist
card.text: Whenever Conspiracy Theorist attacks, you may pay {1} and discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard one or more nonland cards, you may exile one of them from your graveyard. If you do, you may cast it this turn.

card.name: On the Case
card.text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player may pay {2}. If the player doesn't, you create a Clue token. (It's a colorless artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Time Walker
card.text: Time Walker can't be blocked. Whenever Time Walker deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1. Then if it isn't an extra turn, you may exile ten cards from your graveyard. If you do, take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Tamrin, Veteran Agent
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) Other permanents' loyalty abilities you activate cost an additional [+1] to activate. [level -X] Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Anomalous Awakener
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Target player gains 1 life.

card.name: Taskbot Savior
card.text: {W}, Sacrifice Taskbot Savior: Return target creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Doomed Analyst
card.text: When Doomed Analyst dies, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Meticulous Assistant
card.text: Whenever Meticulous Assistant enters, for each kind of counter on target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind.

card.name: Researcher's Assistant
card.text: Flying When Researcher's Assistant entersm you get {V} (a research counter). Whenever Researcher's Assistant attacks, if you have three or more {V}, target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Conspicuous Taskbot
card.text: {3}{W}, {T}: Sacrifice Conspicuous Taskbot: Create three 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Conspicuous Evidence
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Conspicuous Evidence: Draw a card. {1}{U}, {T}: Sacrifice Conspicuous Evidence: Create three Clue tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Conspicuous Wealth
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Conspicuous Wealth: Add one mana of any color. {3}{B}, {T}: Sacrifice Conspicuous Wealth: Create three Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Conspicuous Sample
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice Conspicuous Sample: Draw a card. {2}{R}, {T}: Sacrifice Conspicuous Sample: Create three Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Conspicuous Meal
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Conspicuous Meal: You gain 3 life. {1}{G}, {T}: Sacrifice Conspicuous Meal: Create three Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Forward Scout
card.text: Whenever Forward Scout deals combat damage to a player, you may shuffle a card named Imminent Invasion into your library from outside the game. If you don't, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Break Facilitator
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Tap target creature.

card.name: Odd Ox
card.text: Vigilance {1}{W}, Exile Odd Ox from your graveyard: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Taskbot Gatherer
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Splinterflock
card.text: Flying Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Relentless Reporter
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice an artifact or another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Relentless Reporter.

card.name: Recovery Agent
card.text: When Recovery Agent enters, you get {V} (a research counter). Lifelink At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have three or more {V}, put a +1/+1 counter on Recovery Agent.

card.name: Security Procedures
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Security Procedures, tap an untapped artifact you control or pay {2}. Destroy target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Stored in the Archives
card.text: Enchant creature or planeswalker Enchanted permanent can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: Omnipresent Watch
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: New Gear
card.text: When New Gear enters, you get {V} (a research counter). Equipped creature gets +1/+1. When equipped creature attacks, if you have three or more {V}, it gains first strike until end of turn. Equip {1}

card.name: Recharge
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Put a loyalty counter on on each permanent you control with a loyalty ability.

card.name: Reallocate
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Mallik, the Curator
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you attack with three or more creatures, you get {V} (a research counter). As long as you have ten or more {V}, other creatures you control have vigilance, and after your first combat phase there's an additional combat phase.

card.name: Subject MW02
card.text: You may remove loyalty counters from Subject MW02 to pay part or all of the costs of loyalty abilities of other permanents you control. Creatures you control get +1/+1. When Subject MW02 dies, return her to the battlefield transformed. (You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) Flying Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each loyalty counter on Gemma Unbound. --- (Back): Gemma Unbound

card.name: Gemma Unbound
card.text:
[level +1]
--- (Front): Subject MW02

card.name: Gordon, Threshold Wrangler
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, if there are five or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you get {V} (a research counter). At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have ten or more {V}, target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creature types among non-Human creatures you control.

card.name: Angelic Taskmaster
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Angelic Taskmaster enters or attacks, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Colorless creatures you control have vigilance.

card.name: Adamantine Enforcer
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level +1] Tap target creature. [level -2] Until your next turn, Adamantine Enforcer gets +2/+2 and gains indestructible.

card.name: Cecil, Head of Development
card.text: When Cecil, Head of Development enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. {1}{U}: Target colorless creature has base power and toughness 4/4 until end of turn.

card.name: Grizzled Mentor
card.text: Double strike {1}, Sacrifice another artifact or creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Grizzled Mentor.

card.name: Mortal Coil
card.text: When Mortal Coil enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield and attach Mortal Coil to it. Whenever Mortal Coil becomes unattached from a creature, exile that creature. Equipped creature has indestructible.

card.name: Field Agent
card.text: As long as you have gotten {V} (research counter) this turn, Field Agent gets +2/+2.

card.name: Buddybot
card.text: When Buddybot enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Buddybot's power and toughness are each equal to the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Spark Studier
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] For each kind of counter on another target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind.

card.name: Transport Master
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] You and target opponent each draw a card.

card.name: Unrealized Flying Object
card.text: {W}, Sacrifice another artifact: Unrealized Flying Object gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Threshold Warden
card.text: Spark 1 (This creature enters with a loyalty counter on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Exile target creature or planeswalker an opponent controls until Threshold Warden leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Unseen Guardian
card.text: Flash Flying When Unseen Guardian enters, you may return another target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Metrics Tracker
Come in Peace
card.text: Each player chooses one. The same mode may be chosen this way more than once. • Each player creates two 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. • Each player gains 4 life. • Each player draws a card.

card.name: Auto-Restoration
card.text: Choose one — • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Create three 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens.

card.name: Take as Evidence
card.text: You get {V} (a research counter), then counter up to one target spell unless its controller pays {X}, where X is the number of {V} you have.

card.name: Investigative Journalist
card.text: Whenever Investigative Journalist attacks and isn't blocked, you get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Phone Home
card.text: Draw three cards, then discard two cards. Flashback {5}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: What Lurks Among Men
card.text: Whenever What Lurks Among Men attacks, you may put a card from your hand onto the battlefield face down, tapped, and attacking. (It's a 2/2 creature.) Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Escaped Abomination
card.text: Trample Escaped Abomination's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creature types among non-Human creatures you control.

card.name: Riftmender
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level 0] Put a loyalty counter on target permanent with a loyalty ability. [level -2] Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each counter on it.

card.name: Dispassionate Experimentor
card.text: Spark 4 (This creature enters with four loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) Dispassionate Experimentor has all loyalty abilities of all cards in your graveyard. [level -2] Sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Bot Depot
card.text: When Bot Depot enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Whenever one or more cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere other than the battlefield, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Endless Aliases
card.text: Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast. Whenever a creature enters, under your control, if you didn't cast it from hand, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Retromaniac
card.text: When Retromaniac enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Artifact creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Protoplasm
card.text: You may have Protoplasm enter as a copy of any cryptid you control, except it enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it and it's an Alien Ooze Shapeshifter in addition to its other types. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Field Testing
card.text: Create two 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Paranoid Droid
card.text: Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Prospective Detective
card.text: When Prospective Detective enters, create a Clue token. (It's a colorless artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Disturbance Monitor
card.text: Flying Whenever Disturbance Monitor deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tireless Researcher
card.text: When Tireless Researcher enters, you get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Lurking Anomaly
card.text: {3}{U}: You get {V} (a research counter). Lurking Anomaly can't attack unless you have three or more {V}.

card.name: Area 0 — Threshold
card.text: Area 0 — Threshold enters tapped. When Area 0 — Threshold enters, create a copy of Threshold Stalker. You may cast the copy. (It's a {2}{G} 4/2 Beast Horror creature with Trample.) {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Interplanar Extraction Labs
card.text: Spark 2 (This permanent enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level 0] Add {C}. [level -1] Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Inside Scoop
card.text: Enchant creature When Inside Scoop enters, draw a card. Enchanted creatures you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance.

card.name: Lab Results
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Void Prober
card.text: When Void Prober enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, you get {V}{V} (two research counters). Otherwise, you get {V}. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Distant Melody
card.text: Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type. (Cryptid is not a creature type.)

card.name: Hushed Operation
card.text: Counter target spell or loyalty ability. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Puzzleform
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell that shares a name with a card in your graveyard or a permanent you control, put a +1/+1 counter on Puzzleform, then you may have it become a 0/0 Illusion creature with flying until end of turn. {2}{U}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Background Check
card.text: Look at up to one target face-down creature or face-down card in exile. Draw a card.

card.name: Cryoexamination
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures. They don't untap during their controller's next untap step. You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Organic Automation
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell. Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Multiplying Multiplier
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of Multiplying Multiplier.

card.name: Testing Grounds
card.text: You may have Testing Grounds enter the battlefield tapped. If you do, you get {V} (a research counter). {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you have three or more {V}.

card.name: Warped Landscape
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Warped Landscape: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Abduct
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a cryptid. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.) Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Records Auditor
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Bwrfbn, Hidden Eye
Recon Squad
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level +1] Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) [level -3] Return target artifact, instant, or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Hypothesphinx
card.text: Flying Whenever Hypothesphinx enters or attacks, surveil 2. Whenever one or more cards are put into your graveyard from your library, you may have each opponent exile twice that many cards from the top of their library.

card.name: Mass Prototyping
card.text: Choose one— • Create X 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. • You get X {V} (research counters).

card.name: Mindjack
card.text: Enchant creature or planeswalker You can't choose a permanent with mana value greater than the amount of {V} (research counters) you have as this spell's target as you cast it. You control enchanted permanent.

card.name: Project Tech
card.text: As Project Tech enters, choose a creature card name. Whenever a creature with the chosen name enters, target player mills three cards.

card.name: Rapid Developer
card.text: When Rapid Developer enters, you get {V}. (A research counter.) {T}: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Activate only if you have three or more {V}.

card.name: Formtwister
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Want to Believe
card.text: When Want to Believe enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Whenever a cryptid enters under your control, return Want to Believe to its owner's hand. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: The World is Hollow
card.text: You may look at the bottom card of your library. You may play land and creature cards from the bottom of your library. At the beginning of your upkeep, put the bottom card of your library into your graveyard.

card.name: Close Encounter
card.text: Search your library and/or outside the game for a cryptid card you own, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.) {G}{G}, Exile Close Encounter from your graveyard: Add two mana of any one type. (Mana of any color, or {C}.)

card.name: Bizarreborist
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level +1] Untap target land. [level -3] Create a colorless Forest land token. (It has "{T}: Add {G}.")

card.name: Anomaly Tamer
card.text: (You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) Whenever a land enters under your control, put a loyalty counter on Anomaly Tamer. [level -3] Create two 2/2 green Wolf creature tokens.

card.name: Into the World
card.text: Return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand, then if Into the World was cast from exile, you may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Toxin Tester
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Breakthrough Subject
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Breakthrough Subject and another creature: Search your library for a Rat card with mana value 4 or less and cast it without paying its mana cost. Shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Willing Volunteers
card.text: When you sacrifice Willing Volunteers, you may pay 1 life. If you do, return it to your hand.

card.name: Hapless Victim
card.text: When Hapless Victim enters, create a 2/1 black Rat creature token.

card.name: Creator of Formulas
card.text: When Creator of Formulas enters, you may sacrifice a creature or planeswalker. If you do, choose one— • You get {V} (a research counter). • Put two loyalty counters on target permanent with a loyalty ability.

card.name: Nightmare Stalker
card.text: When Nightmare Stalker enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls that was dealt damage this turn. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Rastafel's Menaces
card.text: Menace When Rastafel's Menaces enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, each opponent discards a card. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Dissect
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Double-Agency
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead. (Undercover creatures exiled this way enter exile face up.) Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Weed Out
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a non-Human creature.

card.name: Recover Assets
card.text: Surveil 2 (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {5}{B}, Exile Recover Assets from your graveyard: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Interrogate
card.text: Target opponent reveals one or more cards from their hand. You choose one of them. They discard that card. For each card in their hand not revealed this way, they lose 1 life.

card.name: Crypt Cleaner
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Emergence Zone
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Emergence Zone: You may cast spells this turn as though they had flash.

card.name: Osbargoth, the First Anamoly
card.text: (You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) Flying, trample Whenever Osbargoth, the First Anamoly deals combat damage to a player, put that many loyalty counters on it. [level -4] Destroy target creature. [level -10] Destroy target player.

card.name: Spree Slasher
card.text: As you cast a card named Spree Slasher for the first time in a game, choose and note a number. When Spree Slasher enters, destroy target creature with mana value equal to a number noted this game for cards named Spree Slasher. Whenever Spree Slasher deals combat damage to a player, you may return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: The Facetaker
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create an X/X black Horror creature token, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast that spell.

card.name: The Overrat
card.text: Haste {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Search your library for a Rat card and cast it without paying its mana cost. Then shuffle.

card.name: Ratastrophe
card.text: Destroy all non-Rat creatures.

card.name: Standard Specimen
card.text: (Melds with Long-Tail Rat) When Standard Specimen dies, you get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Waste Analyst
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -2] Each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Plague Researcher
card.text: Deathtouch Attacking creature tokens you control have deathtouch.

card.name: Horrific Success
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Horrific Success and another creature: Search your library for a Rat card with mana value 8 or less and cast it without paying its mana cost. Shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Spark Siphoner
card.text: Flash When Spark Siphoner enters, remove all counters from up to one target permanent and put that many +1/+1 counters on Spark Siphoner.

card.name: What Lurks in Shadows
card.text: Flying Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.) {3}{B}{B}: Return What Lurks in Shadows from your graveyard to the battlefield face down.

card.name: Exploratory Biopsy
card.text: When Exploratory Biopsy enters, you get {V} (a research counter). Whenever you get one or more {V}, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Dilligent Droid
card.text: {2}{R}, Exile Dilligent Droid from your graveyard: Discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Mechanized Infantry Batallion
card.text: Haste Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Bloodcurler
card.text: When Bloodcurler enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, discard your hand, then draw two cards. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Analyze the Remains
card.text: Analyze the Remains deals 2 damage to any target. {R}, Exile Analyze the Remains from your graveyard: You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Illuminating Flame
card.text: Illuminating Flame deals 5 damage to target creature. Surveil X, where X is the excess damage dealt this way. (To surveil X, look at the top X cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Shifting Allegiance
card.text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Rapid Development
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Verminate
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, create a 2/1 black Rat creature token.

card.name: Destructive Tampering
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Creatures without flying can't block this turn.

card.name: Self-Catalyzer
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Self-Catalyzer deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Newshounds
card.text: Haste {T}: Target creature with power 2 or less gains haste until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Strike from the Record
card.text: This spell costs {1} more to cast if it targets a basic land. Destroy target colorless permanent.

card.name: Superconductor
card.text: Whenever a source you control deals noncombat damage to a permanent or player, you get {V} (a research counter). {3}{R}{R}, Sacrifice Superconductor: Superconductor deals X damage to any target, where X is the amount of {V} you have.

card.name: HAL, From Accounting
card.text: HAL, From Accounting enters with an additional loyalty counter on it for each {C} spent to cast it. [+1]: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. [-4]: Discard your hand, then draw a card for each colorless creature you control.

card.name: Propane Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you surveilled this turn, you may pay {R}. If you do, return Propane Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Ego Influencers
card.text: Spark 1 (This creature enters with a loyalty counter on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level +1] Target creature gains haste until end of turn. [level -3] Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Whipfang
card.text: {R}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Whipfang deals X damage to any target, where X is the sacrificed creature's power. If the sacrificed creature was colorless, put a +1/+1 counter on Whipfang. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Unleash the Archives
card.text: Exile the top X cards of your library. Put any number of creature cards with mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield. Those creatures gains haste. Sacrifice them at end of turn.

card.name: Intimidator-inator
card.text: Sacrifice an artifact: Target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Cole, Impetuous Agent
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature with mana value 3 or greater enters, sacrifice Cole, Impetuous Agent.

card.name: Blood-Hazed Specimen
card.text: Trample, haste When Blood-Hazed Specimen enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on Blood-Hazed Specimen. • Add {R} for each creature type among non-Human creatures you control. {2}{R}: Double Blood-Hazed Specimen's power until end of turn.

card.name: Restless Seeking
card.text: When Restless Seeking enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Loose Cannon
card.text: First strike Whenever Loose Cannon deals combat damage to a player, instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {2} less to cast this turn.

card.name: Interplanar Expert
card.text: When Interplanar Expert enters, choose target creature. If it has a loyalty ability, put a loyalty counter on it. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Overgrowth Researchers
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type. (Mana of any color, or {C}.) {3}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Overgrowth Researchers.

card.name: Threshold Stalker
card.text: Trample

card.name: Biomaximizer
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Untap target creature.

card.name: Master of Symbiosis
card.text: Spark 2 (This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Outland Beast Tracker
card.text: When Outland Beast Tracker enters, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Overgrown Mass
card.text: Overgrown Mass can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. {3}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Overgrown Mass.

card.name: Typical Pet
card.text: Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Overgrowth Spasms
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Influence of the Beyond
card.text: Choose target creature. If it has a loyalty ability, put two loyalty counters on it. Otherwise, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Commune with the Unnatural
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a cryptid or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.)

card.name: Blend In
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has ward {2}. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Simulated Terrain
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one type." (Mana of any color, or {C}.)

card.name: Reverse Engineering
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Tendrils from Below
card.text: Tendrils from Below enters with four +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever Tendrils from Below attacks or blocks, remove a +1/+1 counter from it. If you do, create a token that's a copy of Tendrils from Below.

card.name: Evolution Driver
card.text: Spark 3 (This creature enters with three loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Choose another target creature. If it has a loyalty ability, put a loyalty counter on it. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Living Lichen
card.text: When Living Lichen enters, choose one— • Put two +1/+1 counters on Living Lichen. • Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Field Operator
card.text: Spark 1 (This creature enters with a loyalty counter on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level -1] Until your next turn, you may cast creature spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Haze Lurker
card.text: Flash When Haze Lurker enters, prevent all combat damage that other creatures would deal this turn. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Hydrofarming
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. You get {V} (a research counter).

card.name: Traveling Taskbot
card.text: When Traveling Taskbot dies, for each kind of counter on target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind.

card.name: Buzzing Drone
card.text: Flying When Buzzing Drone enters, surveil 1. You get {V}. ({V} is a research counter. To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard.) (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Display Visor
card.text: You may look at face-down creatures you don't control and face-down cards in exile. {T}: Add one mana of any type. (Mana of any color, or {C}.)

card.name: Ordinary Operator
card.text: Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Samara, Containment Proctor
card.text: Whenever you get one or more {V} (research counters), put that may loyalty counters on Samara, Containment Proctor. [+1]: Surveil 1. [-3]: Choose target creature card in your graveyard or target creature on the battlefield. Return it to its owner's hand. You get {V}. [-8]: You get an emblem with "Whenever a nontoken creature enters, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a black Shade in addition to its other colors and types."

card.name: The Progenitor-Mutant
card.text: Cryptids you control have ward {1}. (Aliens, Eldrazi, Horrors, and Mutants are cryptids.) Rather than choose the indicated number of modes for spells and abilities you control, you may choose one or more modes. You can't choose any mode more than once.

card.name: Cosmos Delver
card.text: When Cosmos Delver enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, draw a card. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Memory Editor
card.text: When Memory Editor enters, target player discards a card. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice Memory Editor: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Its controller discards a card.

card.name: Strange Monolith
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type. (Mana of any color, or {C}.) {T}: Add three mana of any one type. Activate only if you have three or more {V}.

card.name: Standard-Issue Crossbow
Planeswalking Augmentation
card.text: Equipped permanent isn't a creature and is a planeswalker in addition to its other types. Equipped permanent has "[+2]: Surveil 2." and "[-6]: Mill three cards. Put any number of permanent cards from among the milled cards onto the battlefield." {2}: Put a loyalty counter on target creature or planeswalker you control, and attach Planeswalking Augmentation to it. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Spark Extraction
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Remove two counters from target permanent. Choose one— • Put two loyalty counters on target permanent with a loyalty ability. • Target player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Mutagenic Hydra
card.text: When Mutagenic Hydra enters, choose one— • Put X +1/+1 counters on Mutagenic Hydra. • Choose any number of other permanents and/or players, then give each X additional counters of each kind already there.

card.name: Extinction-Level Event
card.text: Exile all creatures and all creature cards from all graveyards.

card.name: Slow Burn
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When Slow Burn enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put a flame counter on enchanted creature, then Slow Burn deals damage to enchanted creature equal to the number of flame counters on it.

card.name: Taboo Experimentation
card.text: You get {V} (a research counter), then search your library for a nonland card with mana value less than or equal to the number of {V} you have, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Colossification
card.text: Enchant creature When Colossification enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature gets +20/+20.

card.name: Once Upon a Midnight Dreary
card.text: If this spell is the first spell you've cast this game, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Nightmare Fuel
card.text: When Nightmare Fuel enters, exile all creature cards from all graveyards. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a card exiled with Nightmare Fuel onto the battlefield under your control. It's a Horror in addition to its other types.

card.name: Soul Absorption
card.text: If you would lose life, you may exile that many cards from the top of your library instead.

card.name: Masked Tempter
card.text: When Masked Tempter enters, each player discards their hand. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Shella Codebreaker
card.text: Vigilance For each color among permanents you control, Shella Codebreaker has protection from that color. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything that color.)

card.name: Parallel Door
card.text: Whenever a player would draw a card, they may instead exile the top card of another player's library face down. If they do, they may look at and play that card for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Pitfall Engineer
card.text: When Pitfall Engineer enters, you get {V} (a research counter). Whenever you get one or more {V}, you may tap or untap target nonland permanent.

card.name: Exceptional Experiment
card.text: As long as you have three or more {V}, you may cast Exceptional Experiment from your graveyard.

card.name: Upgraded Operatives
card.text: When Upgraded Operatives enters you get {V} (a research counter). Whenever you get one or more {V}, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Brainswarm
card.text: You get {V} (a research counter). Then for each {V} you have, you lose 1 life and create a 2/1 black Rat creature token.

card.name: Null Revival
card.text: Return target card from your graveyard to the battlefield face down. (It's a 2/2 creature.)

card.name: Artful Dodge
card.text: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Flashback {U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Crime Scene
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Crime Scene: Draw a card.

card.name: Jemdar, the Interrogator
card.text: Deathtouch At the beginning of each end step, if an opponent discarded a card this turn, you get {V} (a research counter). At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have ten or more {V}, you may put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Ashmoth, the Blazing End
card.text: Menace Whenever an artifact you control enters for the first time each turn, you get {V} (a research counter). As long as you have ten or more {V}, change the text of Equipment you control by replacing each instance of "equipped creature" with "each creature you control."

card.name: Winks, Private Eye
card.text: When Winks, Private Eye enters, investigate. {1}, Sacrifice an artifact: Exile Winks face down with a cover counter on it. Undercover (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. When it dies while face down, exile it face down without revealing it and put a cover counter on it. Players may look at and cast face down cards they own exiled with cover counters.)

card.name: Area 3 — Interrogation
card.text: Area 3 — Interrogation enters tapped. When Area 3 — Interrogation enters, create a copy of Interrogate. You may cast the copy. (It's a {B} sorcery with "Target opponent reveals one or more cards from their hand. You choose one of them. They discard that card. For each card in their hand not revealed this way, they lose 1 life.") {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Area 53 — Armory
card.text: Area 53 — Armory enters tapped. When Area 53 — Armory enters, create a copy of Tools of the Trade. You may cast the copy. (It's a {3}{R} Equipment artifact with "When Tools of the Trade enters, attach it to target creature you control." and "Equipped creature gets +3/+3." and "Equip {3}{R}") {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: Area 16 — Laboratories
card.text: Area 16 — Laboratories enters tapped. When Area 16 — Laboratories enters, create a copy of Lab Results. You may cast the copy. (It's a {3}{U} instant with "Surveil 2, then draw two cards.") {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Area 99 — Archives
card.text: Area 99 — Archives enters tapped. When Area 99 — Archives enters, create a copy of Stored in the Archives. You may cast the copy. (It's a {2}{W} Aura enchantment with "Enchant creature or planeswalker" and "Enchanted permanent can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.") {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Day-to-Day Activity
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures with no abilities enter the battlefield under your control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Bottled Lightning
card.text: Spark 4 (This permanent enters with four loyalty counters on it. You may activate a loyalty ability of this permanent once during your turn as a sorcery.) [level 0] Move a loyalty counter from Bottled Lightning onto another permanent you control with a loyalty ability.
